recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: Someone Great
recommendations.overview: An aspiring music journalist lands her dream job and is about to move to San Francisco when her boyfriend of nine years decides to call it quits. To nurse her broken heart, she and her two best friends spend one outrageous last adventure in New York

recommendations.title: Anesthesia
recommendations.overview: Multiple lives intersect in the aftermath of the violent mugging of a Columbia University philosophy professor.

recommendations.title: Leaves of Grass
recommendations.overview: An Ivy League professor returns home, where his pot-growing twin brother has concocted a plan to take down a local drug lord.

recommendations.title: Populaire
recommendations.overview: An insurance agent and his new secretary become locked in the grip of romance and competition as they train together for a speed-typing contest.

recommendations.title: Vertigo
recommendations.overview: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: SK1
recommendations.overview: The hunt, capture and trial of Guy Georges, one of France's most notorious serial killers.

recommendations.title: The Zodiac
recommendations.overview: An elusive serial killer known as the Zodiac terrorizes the San Francisco Bay in the late 1960s, while detectives aim to stop him before he claims more victims. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Time After Time
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Drama, Comedy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Writer H. G. Wells pursues Jack the Ripper to modern day San Francisco after the infamous serial killer steals his time machine to escape the 19th century.

recommendations.title: Sharm El Sheikh: Un'estate indimenticabile
recommendations.overview: An insurance agent, in order to save his job, leaves with his family for the trendy Egyptian resort of Sharm El Sheikh, where his boss will also spend the holidays.
